_readme: EDIT THIS FILE to add knowledge to Deum's chat bot. Save and push to deploy.

pricing._note: Keep this in sync with the website!
pricing.cancel_policy: Cancel anytime, active until period ends, no refunds

how_it_works: 1. Upload your video (MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV - up to 2GB)
2. AI identifies and removes filler words (um, uh, er, like)
4. You get an email when it's ready
product.processing_time: Matches video length - 10 min video = ~10 min processing

filler_removal.validation: Two-stage validation prevents cutting real words

security.encryption: Encrypted at rest and in transit
security.no_training: We never train AI on your content
security.no_sharing: Videos are never shared or sold

faq.a: Processing time matches your video length. A 10-minute video takes about 10 minutes to process, including AI transcription, filler detection, and rendering.
All common video formats: MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV. Also audio-only files (MP3, WAV, M4A) for podcast editing.
2GB - that's enough for about 2 hours of HD video or 4+ hours of standard definition.

faq.q: How accurate is the filler detection?
faq.a: 97% accuracy. We use a two-stage validation system to prevent cutting real words. We recommend adding b-roll to cover any imperfect transitions.

faq.q: Is my video private and secure?
faq.a: Yes! Videos are processed in isolated cloud environments with enterprise-grade security, stored with encryption, automatically deleted after 24 hours, and never shared, sold, or used for training.

faq.q: What happens to my original video?
faq.a: Original upload is deleted immediately after processing. The clean video is kept for 24 hours for download, then permanently deleted.
Not yet. Automatic removal is what makes us so fast and simple. We recommend trying a short clip first to see the results.
English (all accents - US, UK, Australian, etc.). We auto-detect accents. Other languages coming soon.
No. Unused hours reset each month and don't carry over. Use them or lose them!

faq.q: Can I use Deum for podcasts?
faq.a: Absolutely! Upload audio-only files (MP3, WAV, M4A) and we'll remove fillers just like video. Perfect for podcast editing.
Yes, cancel anytime. Your subscription remains active until the end of your billing period. No refunds for unused time.
Email hello@deum.video with details. If confirmed, you get 3 free processing hours as a thank you!

descript.speed: 10x faster - Deum auto-processes, Descript requires 90+ min of manual editing
descript.simplicity: Upload → Download vs. complex timeline and script editing
descript.customer_quote: Saved me 2 hours on every video. Descript without the confusion. - Aiva Rose

value_props: Upload, go grab coffee, get professional results

common_objections.too_expensive: Hobby is $20/month for 10 hours - that's $2 per video hour. An editor costs $50-100/hour. We're 25-50x cheaper!
common_objections.sounds_robotic: 97% accuracy keeps natural speech. Customers say it sounds like them, just more polished.
common_objections.learning_curve: Dead simple: Upload, wait, download. No timeline, no scrubbing, no editing software needed.
common_objections.want_cheaper: Free plan gives you 1 hour/month to try. Annual plans save 25-28%. Extra hours are $3 each.
